product: Embed Genie Agent will soon be available by default for workspaces with the…
tagline: Embedding a Genie Agent as an iframe will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in June 2026.
what_it_does: Embedding a Genie Agent as an iframe will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in June 2026. Embedding a Genie Agent lets business users interact with Genie directly within your internal tools or portals without navigating to Databricks. Embed a Genie Agent as an iframe in an external website or application so users can interact with Genie inside your internal tools or portals without navigating to Databricks.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
